electron_only_capabilities.disposition: backendize diagnostics aggregation; keep only a thin frontend viewer if needed
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI diagnostics viewer over backend diagnostics query APIs

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: backendize audit/query model; frontend consumes query APIs
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI governance viewer over backend audit query APIs
electron_only_capabilities.blocker: still need broader governance coverage in WinUI

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: keep manual decision UI in frontend; backendize review state and transitions
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI manual review UI over backend review state transitions
electron_only_capabilities.blocker: still need broader governance coverage in WinUI

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: backendize policy engine/versioning; keep rule editing, mute, and override UI in frontend
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI governance editor over backend sandbox policy/version APIs
electron_only_capabilities.blocker: remaining gap is Electron-only deep debug tooling

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: backendize version index/diff computation; keep result viewer thin
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI version viewer over backend version diff/index services

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: backendize queue control semantics; keep operator control panel in frontend
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI queue admin surface over backend queue control APIs
electron_only_capabilities.blocker: WinUI has run path, not admin queue tooling

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: backendize rule storage/evaluation/versioning; keep frequent rule editing in frontend
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI quality rule editor over backend quality rule set APIs
electron_only_capabilities.blocker: still need versioning/editor parity in WinUI

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: keep in frontend; this is human-curated workflow authoring, not backend runtime truth
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI template marketplace and pack management frontend
electron_only_capabilities.blocker: still need a WinUI template marketplace decision and surface

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: backendize publish pipeline/registry semantics; keep publish form in frontend
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI publish form over backend workflow app publish APIs

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: backendize lineage/compare computation; frontend remains a viewer/filter surface
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: WinUI lineage/baseline viewer over backend compare services

electron_only_capabilities.disposition: keep only as dev-only frontend over debug endpoints, or delete once backend/debug contracts are sufficient
electron_only_capabilities.migration_target: delete or re-home behind shared debug contracts

retained_compatibility_surfaces.rule: keep off primary onboarding and primary release path

delete_only_rules.reason: already architecturally incorrect after WinUI-primary decision
